name: cadence-suite
description: Cadence — React portal + shared Express service + Teams bot, deployed together as a single Azure App Service (one process serves the SPA, the /api REST + AI, and the bot's /api/messages).

scripts.build:portal: cd cadence-portal && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:bot: cd cadence-teams-agent/teams-bot && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:portal && npm run build:bot && npm run build:service
